candidates.label: Brief first-person declarative activity
candidates.description: Short one-sentence posts that state a personal action and an evaluative adjective.

citations.text: I bought this album today, it's awesome.
Also bought this album, also very awesome.

candidates.scope_note: Limited to posts in this batch.
candidates.boundary_note: Not all first-person statements are brief or evaluative; longer narrative posts differ.

candidates.label: Random fandom declarations
candidates.description: Posts where the author declares being a fan of an arbitrary noun.

citations.text: became a fan of the word 'flapjack'.

candidates.boundary_note: Other fan-like posts may use different phrasing and are not captured here.

candidates.label: First-person desire expressions using want/wanna
candidates.description: Posts that express a personal desire with 'want' or colloquial 'wanna'.

citations.text: I want to start a Facebook fight with someone. Anyone up for it? There are 2 rules. 1. I will say incomprehensible things about on on my Facebook status in ALL CAPS. 2. If you return fire, I will de-friend you. Anyone?

candidates.boundary_note: Desire statements in other contexts may not use 'want' or 'wanna'.
